title: On-Campus Data Science Trainer
desc:
I need an experienced professional who can step into Lovely Professional University’s classrooms in Phagwara and steer three MCA (Data Science) courses this coming semester:

• Data Science on the Cloud: Platforms and Practices  
• Deep Learning: Architectures and Applications  
• Foundations of Programming for Data Science (Python)

The sessions will follow a lecture-based format blended with practical demonstrations and short guided exercises so students see the theory in action. My core goals are straightforward: help them grasp the foundational concepts, get comfortable with industry-standard tools, and sharpen their problem-solving mindset before they move on to larger capstone projects.

You should already have at least 03+ years of proven training or teaching experience and be confident running full-day, in-person classes. Physical presence on campus is essential; remote delivery isn’t an option for this engagement.

What I’ll place in your hands: official course textbooks and instructor guides from the university. Software licences, lab access, and cloud credits will need to be orchestrated through you or sourced on-site with the IT team, so comfort navigating those discussions is important.

By the end of the assignment I expect handling all course-related responsibilities, including:
1. Documentation
2. Assessment preparation
3. Student attendance updates
4. Course file maintenance
5. Any other academic activities related to the program

title: Tech Pack Expert Needed for 6 Luxury Apparel Designs - $125 Fixed Price
desc:
Project Description:
We are a premium fashion house, LYNOMIE, specializing in quiet luxury aesthetics, structured drapes, and high-end streetwear. Our brand has officially secured its legal trademark registrations under the Intellectual Property India Registry, and we are now moving into the physical sample production phase. 

We are looking for an expert Fashion Tech Pack Designer for a STRICT FIXED-PRICE PROJECT OF $125 USD to develop 100% unique, production-ready Tech Packs for our initial drop of 6 Core Designs:
1. 02 Luxury Formal and Casual Shirts
2. 02 Heavy-GSM Luxury Streetwear T-Shirts (220-240 GSM, Oversized Fit)
3. 02 High-End Ladies Western Tops (Premium Satin / Structured Drapes)

What we will provide:
36-Page Official Brand Guideline Book including vector source AI logos, typography rules, and champagne gold hex codes.

What we strictly require in the final deliverables:
1. Flat Sketches and Technical CAD Drawings (Front and Back view with stitch callouts).
2. Complete Measurement Spec Sheets with a Total of 8 Custom Sizes: 4 Asian Sizes (S, M, L, XL) tailored for regular/slim fits, and 4 Western Sizes (S, M, L, XL) tailored for luxury overseas grading.
3. Bill of Materials (BOM) and Stitching Details (Specifying SPI, stitch types, and embroidery alignment coordinates for our LN monogram).

Non-Disclosure and IP Clause: 
All designs, patterns, and charts developed during this project will remain the exclusive Intellectual Property (IP) of LYNOMIE. The designer

title: Soil & Groundwater Screening Reference Compilation
desc:
I need a single, well-structured spreadsheet that brings together official soil and groundwater screening values from at least six separate regulatory frameworks. The study will underpin a larger land-quality project, so every number must be traceable back to the primary guidance document it came from.

Scope of research
• United States – include current US EPA Regional Screening Levels (RSLs) and any companion groundwater tables.  
• European Union – use the most recent EU-wide technical guidance that publishes numerical soil or groundwater quality benchmarks.  
• Australia – draw from the National Environment Protection (Assessment of Site Contamination) Measure and related schedules.  
• Canada – capture values issued federally (e.g. CCME) that cover both media.  
• Netherlands – reference the latest Dutch Soil Quality/Intervention Values tables.  
• Alberta, Canada – incorporate the current Tier 1 Soil & Groundwater Remediation Guidelines.

What I will supply
An Excel template already laid out with media, chemical, exposure scenario and unit fields. You will complete it.

What I need from you
1. Populate every field with the official screening value and unit exactly as published.  
2. For each entry, cite the full document title, publication year, table identifier and the precise page number (or PDF page) where the figure appears.  
3. Provide a PDF snapshot or direct hyperlink for rapid verification.  
4. Double-check figures: AI-generated estimates or secondary summarie

title: Off the map holidays
desc:
I’m scaling the business-travel arm of my agency and need seasoned consultants who can take a trip from first inquiry to post-journey follow-up. Most requests come from professionals traveling for meetings, conferences, and site visits, both within the country and overseas, so speed, accuracy, and policy awareness are critical.

Your core work begins with a discovery call or email to pinpoint the traveler’s goals, preferred carriers, loyalty programs, and any budget or policy limits. From there you will:

• Build an itinerary that aligns with the meeting schedule, suggesting at least two flight and hotel combinations via Amadeus, Sabre, or a comparable GDS.  
• Prepare one clear quotation that rolls flights, hotels, ground transfers, and insurance into a single figure, flagging any penalties or fare-rules the traveler should know.  
• Secure bookings, issue tickets, and liaise with hotel partners, providing immediate confirmation numbers.  
• Coordinate visas or travel authorisations when required, tracking document status and reminding clients of deadlines.  
• Remain the primary point of contact before, during, and after travel, handling reissues, cancellations, or on-trip disruptions quickly and professionally.

Success is measured trip-by-trip: a completed travel pack (PDF and editable file), confirmed services delivered on or under the quoted price, and a satisfied traveler who is willing to book again. If you have a record of managing corporate itineraries, negotiating

title: Cinematic 3D Brand Story Animation
desc:
I’m producing a two-minute, fully 3D advertisement that will introduce my brand through an immersive, cinematic narrative. The visual tone must be realistic—polished materials, accurate lighting, depth-of-field, and fluid movement—paired with professional camera choreography that feels as if it were shot on a real set.  

The script is ready; what I need is your animation expertise to breathe life into it. From blocking and character/object animation to final color grade, I’m looking for smooth transitions, dramatic lighting, and premium rendering that holds up in Full HD (1920 × 1080, H.264 MP4). Appropriate background music and tasteful sound effects should underscore the story; if you have licensed tracks on hand, let me know, otherwise point me to options and I’ll secure the rights.  

When you respond, please share:
• A showreel or portfolio demonstrating realistic 3D work with strong lighting and camera work  
• Your estimated turnaround time from storyboard sign-off to final render  
• A quotation or rate card—my budget is flexible for the right level of quality  

Acceptance criteria  
• Final 2-minute MP4, 1920 × 1080, free of noise/flicker  
• Realistic textures and physically accurate lighting consistent throughout  
• Cinematic camera moves synced to music and SFX  
• One revision pass on animation and one on color/sound prior to final delivery  

Project files are a plus, but the finished video is essential. I look forward to seeing how you can elevate this brand
